llama.notes: Llama 3.3 70B (Cerebras, Cloudflare) and Llama 3.1 70B (Groq, Together, OpenRouter) excellent for tool use. Llama 4 Maverick (LLM Gateway) has 1M context.

qwen.notes: Best for code generation, debugging, and technical documentation. Lower priority for tool use due to model personality issues.

deepseek.notes: DeepSeek V3.1 671B (Ollama) excels at creative problem-solving and extended reasoning. Use for complex analytical tasks, not tool execution.

gemini.notes: Fastest response times, 1M context window for long conversations

claude.notes: Claude 3.7 Sonnet (1min.ai) excellent for complex tool use. Best-in-class reasoning and code generation. 1M credits/month free tier.

gpt.notes: GPT OSS models available on Ollama Cloud for general-purpose tasks.

specialized.notes: Kimi K2 (1T context) and Cohere for specialized enterprise tasks
